---
about:
  template: jolla
  id: about-block
  image: "img/my_image.jpg"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MohamedKeteb
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohamed-mehdi-keteb-782258229  
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
body { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important; font-weight: 400; }
h1, h2, h3 { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif !important; font-weight: 600; }
</style>
```

::: {#about-block}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.title-hover {
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  display: inline-block;
}
.title-hover:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}
</style>

<div class="text-center">
  <h1 class="title-hover">Mohamed M. Keteb</h1>
</div>
```

**PhD** candidate with [Pierre E. Jacob](https://pierrejacob.org/) @ [Department of Information Systems, Data Analytics and Operations](https://ido-department.essec.edu/) -- [ESSEC Business School](https://www.essec.edu/fr/).

**Education**: I graduated from [ENSAE Paris](https://www.ensae.fr/) - [Polytechnic Institute of Paris ](https://www.ip-paris.fr/) and completed a master's degree in [probability and statistics](https://www.imo.universite-paris-saclay.fr/fr/etudiants/masters/mathematiques-et-applications/m2/mathematiques-de-laleatoire/) at the [Institut des Mathématiques d'Orsay](https://www.imo.universite-paris-saclay.fr/fr/), Université Paris-Saclay. 
During my master's thesis, I worked with [Pierre E. Jacob](https://pierrejacob.org/) on unbiased Markov Chain Monte Carlo with couplings, and previously I was an intern with [Francesca Romana Crucinio](https://francescacrucinio.github.io/) on particle swarm optimization.

**Research interests**: I work at the intersection of probability and statistics, with a main focus on methodological and theoretical aspects of Monte Carlo methods. Currently, I focus on unbiased estimation of log marginal likelihood (log evidence) via path sampling and Markov chain coupling.

**contact me at** mohamed [dot] keteb [at] essec.edu
